# @zxing/library Documentation

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@zxing/library)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@zxing/library)
[![npm downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dm/@zxing/library)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@zxing/library)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/npm/l/@zxing/library)](LICENSE)

This is the official documentation site for [**@zxing/library**](https://github.com/zxing-js/library), a TypeScript port of the popular ZXing ("zebra crossing") barcode scanning library.

## What is @zxing/library?

**@zxing/library** is a TypeScript/JavaScript library that provides comprehensive barcode scanning and generation capabilities. It works in both browser environments (with camera access) and Node.js for server-side processing.

### Key Features

- **Multi-Format Support** - Supports QR Code, Data Matrix, Aztec, PDF417, EAN, UPC, Code 39, Code 93, Code 128, and more
- **TypeScript Native** - Full type definitions with excellent IDE support
- **Read & Write** - Both barcode reading and generation capabilities
- **Cross-Platform** - Works in browsers and Node.js

## Documentation

This site is built with [Mintlify](https://mintlify.com) and includes:

- [Introduction](./docs/introduction.mdx) - Overview of @zxing/library
- [Setup](./docs/setup.mdx) - Installation and configuration
- [Architecture](./docs/architecture.mdx) - Technical architecture
- [Usage](./docs/usage.mdx) - Code examples and usage patterns
- [API Reference](./docs/api.mdx) - Detailed API documentation

## Quick Example

```typescript
import { BrowserQRCodeReader } from '@zxing/library';

const codeReader = new BrowserQRCodeReader();

codeReader.decodeFromInputVideoDevice(undefined, 'video')
  .then((result) => {
    console.log('Decoded:', result.text);
  })
  .catch((err) => {
    console.error('Error:', err);
  });
```
